business.name: Pho Bang Restaurant
business.tagline: Family-run Vietnamese kitchen — pho, bún, banh mi, and rice plates.
business.phoneNote: DEMO PLACEHOLDER. Real verified number is (972) 487-6666 — re-confirm on Google Maps (hours/listing vary) before it goes live, then swap it into every tel: link and the JSON-LD.

payments.notes: No online payment for this demo — a walk-in / call-ahead restaurant. If online ordering is added later, use client-owned Stripe Payment Links ONLY (https://buy.stripe.com/...). See docs/STRIPE_SETUP.md.

meta.notes: Spec demo. Public facts only — no scraped logo or photos; placeholder illustration and sample menu/prices/hours. Concept preview, not affiliated. All branding (colors, fonts) lives in assets/css/custom.css as CSS custom properties.
